name: Zhejiang Tianyu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Tianyu Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of pharmaceutical intermediates and APIs in China and internationally. The company offers pharmaceutical intermediates and APIs of cardiovascular, anti-diabetic, anti-atherosclerosis, anticoagulant, and anti-asthmatic series. It also provides fine chemicals and CMO services. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Taizhou, China.
